criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Measures the level of user interaction and time spent within the app.

criteria.name: AI Innovation
criteria.description: Assesses the uniqueness and advancement of AI features within the app.

criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating on app stores.

criteria.name: Download Volume
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, developer reports

criteria.name: Feature Diversity
criteria.description: Variety and range of features offered by the app.
